label: cv101_comm_down
source_note: Synthetic fault scenario: the PLC<->GS10 RS-485 link is down (vfd_comm_ok=false). The VFD analog registers still hold their last-good values but are STALE; MIRA's trust gate must flag A1 CRITICAL and suppress the downstream VFD rules (A2/A9) as stale rather than alarm-storming. Derived from the idle_healthy snapshot with coil 3 forced false.
